calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Instructing Trustee To Account And For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryan Ramseyer appeared by telephone for Allen Joe (Petitioner).

The Court noted that there is no appearance by anyone to object to the petition and that the accounting is for a one year period. The Court granted the Petition for Order to Instruct Trustee to Account and to Compel Final Distribution (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Order Instructing Trustee To Account And For Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-22-2017 Continued To Jul-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryan Ramseyer appeared by telephone for Allen Joe (Petitioner).

The Court noted that there is no appearance on behalf of the Trustee/Respondent. Mr. Ramseyer stated that he has not spoken with Ms. Hoffman, that he did not serve her and that he served her Client. The Court informed Counsel that he needs to serve the Trustee's Attorney. The Petition for Order to Instruct Trustee to Account, etc. is continued to July 10, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice to be served on Ms. Hoffman.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Tim Kneis. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-18-2008 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Apr-30-2008 Continued To Jun-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Hoffman for Dennis Ming (Petitioner). Jessica Smith for Allen Joe (Respondent).

The Court referred to the examiner's notes dated November 27th, stating that there was no response to the questions raised. Ms. Hoffman stated that the responses were in the 2nd accounting, that she would review the notes, and file a declaration within the next week. Ms. Smith stated that they were 85 to 90% in agreement with the accounting, but that there were still some issues that needed to be resolved. The declaration is to be filed by February 20, 2008, and the matter will be taken submission as of that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Giselle Casey CSR#8098. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Continued To Feb-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Nov-27-2007 Continued To Jan-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made. The Court continued the matter to December 11, 2007. The Clerk will notify counsel to appear on that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Smith.

The matter was continued to January 8, 2007, per Ms. Hoffman and Ms. Meyer's (Examiner) confirmation.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Oct-02-2007 Continued To Nov-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Nancy Hoffman appeared for petitioner. Ryan Runsome appeared for Allen Joe.
The Court stated that the accounting cannot be approved and questioned the payments to Dennis Ming's visa. Ms Hoffman represented that the her client worked on the accounting for one year and that she did a lot of work. Mr. Runsome questioned the miscellanious payments. The Court will provide specifics so that the accounting to be done again. The matter was continued to 11/27/07.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Bailiff: Tony Aguerre Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-15-2007 Continued To Oct-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Compelling Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-09-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Picone (Counsel for Allen Joe, Petitioner).

Counsel appeared to advise the Court that the parties have stipulated to the granting of the Petition and the preparation of an accounting with the Accounting to be filed by February 15, 2007. The Court signed the Order for same in open court.

Judicial Officer: Judge John Dearman; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles.
